mechanics.name_guess: STAFFS The Staffs Skill covers the use of
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 107 > items > STAFFS The Staffs Skill covers the use of
mechanics.excerpt: STAFFS The Staffs Skill covers the use of all two-handed melee weapons such as the quarterstaff and any of the various pole arms used by martial artists Short one-handed staffs and sticks would use the Blades Skill (p. 977 instead. SUBMACHINE GUNS This weapon skill is used to make attacks with all burst-fire- capable weapons that can be fired with one hand, including pulse laser pistols_ STEALTH Tne Stealth Skill enables characters move quietly through all types of terrain.
